who: HR payroll managers in small to medium-sized accounting firms processing 5–15 payrolls/week
offer: For HR payroll managers in small to medium-sized accounting firms processing 5–15 payrolls/week, inefficient reporting causes delays in payroll processing. We simplify report generation instead of manual compilation using spreadsheets.
problem: Inefficient payroll reporting leads to delays in payroll processing.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for HR payroll managers
Indie Hackers posts and comments on payroll workflows
DM outreach to HR payroll managers with demo video
Community forums where payroll managers share tools
try_it: Let users try Email delivery of reports and report templates
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing manual workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
